# PR

## Summary

## SPEC references

- Section(s):

## ADHD-doctrine compliance (SPEC §15) — required for UI PRs

- [ ] ≤3 choices at every decision point
- [ ] ≤2 taps to primary action from the relevant screen
- [ ] No backlog / overdue count / red badge introduced
- [ ] Undo-not-confirm (no new modal confirmations, or explicit exception noted)
- [ ] Reduce-motion respected
- [ ] Empty state proposes one next action

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test`
- [ ] Manual on iOS / Android (if UI)
